raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The top surface of box_1 is reachable by the right arm and can be contacted from above without colliding with box_2; applying gentle downward force will not deform the cardboard box.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is constrained against the table (reduced sliding/rotation), improving stability for a subsequent grasp."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left side of box_1 is accessible and there is enough clearance on the left and front of box_1 for the left end-effector to establish a secure side pinch/embrace; box_1 remains stabilized so it will not slip toward box_2 during grasp acquisition.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and lifted/controlled off the tabletop, with minimal disturbance to box_2 and the cup."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The top surface of box_1 is reachable by the right arm and can be contacted from above without colliding with box_2; applying gentle downward force will not deform the cardboard box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is constrained against the table (reduced sliding/rotation), improving stability for a subsequent grasp.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left side of box_1 is accessible and there is enough clearance on the left and front of box_1 for the left end-effector to establish a secure side pinch/embrace; box_1 remains stabilized so it will not slip toward box_2 during grasp acquisition.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and lifted/controlled off the tabletop, with minimal disturbance to box_2 and the cup.
